# Past Android Gradle plugin releases Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.



The pages in the table of contents list the features and improvements for past
major releases of the Android Gradle plugin. To see what's new in the latest
version, see the current
[Android Gradle plugin release notes](/studio/releases/gradle-plugin).

For the latest news on releases, including a list of notable fixes in each
preview release, see the
[release updates](https://androidstudio.googleblog.com/).
